name: 0ne-skills
description: Premium AI skills for Claude Code by 0neOS — research, strategy, automation, and creative tools.

plugins.name: 0neadvisormaker
plugins.description: Create AI advisors from expert content OR software documentation. USE WHEN creating advisor, building persona, advisor from transcript, advisor from content, new advisor, make advisor, advisor setup, advisor for [API/SDK/product], software advisor, API advisor, knowledge base for [product].

plugins.name: 0neagentanalysis
plugins.description: Standardized deep analysis of any AI agent / harness / framework. USE WHEN analyze agent, analyze harness, evaluate agent, evaluate harness, compare to 0ne, deep dive on [agent], should we adopt [X], new shiny thing, /0neAgentAnalysis. Clones repo, runs 5-agent parallel deep-dive (architecture, security, vs-0ne, community, vs-prior), writes 8 standardized files + machine-readable scorecard, regenerates master comparison matrix.

plugins.name: 0neapirecon
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer an undocumented internal web API into a typed CLI + skill. USE WHEN /0neApiRecon, recon api, reverse engineer api, no public api, internal api, capture browser traffic, build client for [product], scrape internal api, intercept browser requests, no open api for X, the public api doesnt support, reverse engineer the website, sniff network requests, undocumented api, hidden api, build my own client for, automate [product] without an api.

plugins.name: 0neclone
plugins.description: Step 6 clone-routing parent skill. Given a `/0neSource`-shaped folder at `03 - Knowledge/<Name>/`, route to the right child (`/Synthesize` for Playbook, `/0neAdvisorMaker` for Advisor, `/0neCouncil` for Council) and land the resulting artifact. Also scaffolds `03 - Knowledge/<Name>/` knowledge folders on natural-language request. USE WHEN {PRINCIPAL_NAME} says /0neClone, "clone [X]", "make a playbook from [X]", "build an advisor from [X]", "convene a council on [X]", "set up a knowledge folder for [X]", "turn this source into a playbook", or otherwise wants to CLONE raw source into a usable artifact (playbook, advisor, or council). Step 6 of 0neOS Roadmap V7 — sits between `/0neSource` (Step 5 gather) and downstream skill-build / execution steps.

plugins.name: 0necloudmerge
plugins.description: Merge a standalone app into your 0ne Cloud as a mini-app. USE WHEN merging app, refactor app for cloud, migrate to cloud, integrate app, fold into cloud, mini-app conversion, move app to cloud.

plugins.name: 0necloudpreview
plugins.description: Start a local preview of your cloud app. USE WHEN preview, see changes, run locally, test locally, start dev server, view my site.

plugins.name: 0necloudpublish
plugins.description: Publish your changes to make them live. USE WHEN publish, go live, make it live, push changes, ship it, deploy, put it online.

plugins.name: 0necloudstatus
plugins.description: Check if your site is working. USE WHEN status, is my site up, is it working, check my site, site down, broken, not loading.

plugins.name: 0necloudundo
plugins.description: Undo your last changes. USE WHEN undo, revert, go back, I broke it, restore, roll back, start over, undo changes.

plugins.name: 0necloudupdate
plugins.description: Apply the latest 0ne Cloud update to your instance. USE WHEN update my 0ne, get latest, apply update, new version, refresh cloud, sync update, install update.

plugins.name: 0necontext
plugins.description: Build and load the AI's context layer — the architectural memory of who {PRINCIPAL_NAME} is, what his business is, and how it operates. USE WHEN /0neContext, /0neContext build, /0neContext commitments, build my context, build context, context interview, north star, master prompt, business brain, business framework, customer lifecycle map, process assessment, RACI map, AI-fy my commitments, inventory my commitments, list my commitments, build my commitments, turn my commitments into projects, /0neContext fridge, build my tech stack, capture my tools, what tools do I own, OR for substantive work that needs business context, strategy context, personal context, thought partnering, 1-3-1 decisions, marketing, campaigns, offer docs, planning, goal setting, business decisions, pricing, competitors, ICP analysis, team discussions, fulfillment, process improvement.

plugins.name: 0necopilot
plugins.description: Live session copilot — Zoom/mic tap → Deepgram STT → live orchestrator → operator surface + prospect artifact. USE WHEN paid session, hiring interview, sales call, sales discovery, discovery call, podcast interview, coaching call, 1-on-1, team standup, live copilot, real-time coaching, live transcription, live prompt, listen along, run copilot, start copilot, /0neCopilot, new mode, mode design, session copilot.

plugins.name: 0necouncil
plugins.description: Orchestrate debates between AI advisors for strategic decisions. USE WHEN council, debate, gather advisors, multiple perspectives, strategic decision, compare advisors, what would X and Y say.

plugins.name: 0nedoctor
plugins.description: 0ne system health check, integrity audit, secret scan, and past-work recall. USE WHEN 0ne doctor, health check, system check, diagnose, self-heal, fix system, integrity check, audit system, check references, scan for secrets, security scan, "we just worked on", "remember when we", "didn't we already".

plugins.name: 0neespanol
plugins.description: Switch the entire 0ne system to Spanish — language preference for One's responses plus Edge TTS voice (Ramona). USE WHEN switch to spanish, change to spanish, cambiar a español, español, espanol, spanish mode, /0neEspañol, /0neEspanol, set language spanish, voz en español.

plugins.name: 0neidentify
plugins.description: Step 4 diagnostic. Find the single biggest constraint when the answer is unclear, hand it to 0neSync to pin. USE WHEN {PRINCIPAL_NAME} says /0neIdentify, "identify my constraint", "find my constraint", "what should I focus on", "I don't know what to work on", "my week feels off", "my business feels stuck", "run the diagnostic", "audit my time", "DRIP", "Mozi 6", "Mozi Six", or asks for a constraint audit.

plugins.name: 0nememory
plugins.description: Deep context loader for One. USE WHEN doing substantive work that needs business context, strategy context, personal context, thought partnering, 1-3-1 decisions, marketing, campaigns, offer docs, planning, goal setting, business decisions, pricing, competitors, ICP analysis, team discussions, fulfillment, process improvement, or any task where deeper understanding of {PRINCIPAL_NAME} would improve output.

plugins.name: 0neonboarding
plugins.description: Interactive guided onboarding for new 0ne users. USE WHEN onboarding, start onboarding, lesson 1, lesson 2, lesson 3, lesson 4, lesson 5, next lesson, first lesson, welcome tour, getting started. Five progressive lessons from system tour to deep context interview.

plugins.name: 0neplan
plugins.description: The plan before the plan — a thought partner that finds the real goal before designing a build. USE WHEN /0nePlan, "0ne plan", "help me plan this build", "design a solution for", "plan out this app", "I have an idea I want to plan", "think through this build with me", "what's the best way to build", "architect this for me", OR before handing a build to plan mode / Algorithm mode. Runs a four-phase arc: extract the true goal, brainstorm solutions, match to what 0ne already owns, hand a designed plan to Build.

plugins.name: 0neproject
plugins.description: Create a new project with proper infrastructure. USE WHEN starting a new project, "let's build", "let's start", "new project for", "kick off a project", or whenever {PRINCIPAL_NAME} is beginning multi-session work. Auto-creates the project folder under 02 - Projects/ with CLAUDE.md and PROJECT-STATE.md.

plugins.name: 0neslack
plugins.description: Slack app setup and configuration. USE WHEN slack, slack bot, set up slack, configure slack, slack token, slack app, slack workspace, 0neslack.

plugins.name: 0nesource
plugins.description: Step 5 source-gathering parent skill. Given a constraint and a one-line ask, route to the right child tool (Download / Research extensive / Transcribe / OSINT / Apify / firecrawl / 0neApiRecon) and land raw material in 03 - Knowledge/<Name>/Source Material/. USE WHEN {PRINCIPAL_NAME} says /0neSource, "source [X]", "gather expert content", "capture this podcast", "load up [expert] knowledge", "pull material on [topic]", "build a source folder for [expert/product]", "start sourcing for my constraint", "scrape this site for source material", "interview my senior employee", "camcorder this", or otherwise wants to GATHER raw expert/product/internal material (not synthesize, not build an advisor — that's Step 6 Clone).

plugins.name: 0nesync
plugins.description: Daily execution engine. The constraint router plus the DayOS catch-up cycle. USE WHEN {PRINCIPAL_NAME} says /0neSync, asks "what now", "what should I work on", "what's next", wants to capture a task, clear the inbox, mark something done, run a weekly review, set or change the constraint, or check what he should be doing.

plugins.name: 0netelegram
plugins.description: Telegram bot setup and configuration. USE WHEN telegram, telegram bot, set up telegram, configure telegram, telegram token, botfather, 0netelegram.

plugins.name: 0neupdate
plugins.description: Check for and apply 0ne system updates. USE WHEN update 0ne, update my 0ne, system update, check for updates, upgrade, upgrade 0ne, /0neUpgrade.

plugins.name: 0neupgrade
plugins.description: Check for and apply 0ne system updates. USE WHEN upgrade, update 0ne, system update, check for updates, upgrade 0ne.

plugins.name: apify

plugins.name: art
plugins.description: Complete visual content system. USE WHEN user wants to create visual content, illustrations, diagrams, OR mentions art, header images, visualizations, mermaid, flowchart, technical diagram, infographic, PAI icon, pack icon, or PAI pack icon.

plugins.name: becreative
plugins.description: Extended thinking mode. USE WHEN be creative, deep thinking, deep thinking, extended reasoning. SkillSearch('becreative') for docs.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Debug-first browser automation with always-on visibility. Console logs, network requests, and errors captured by default. USE WHEN browser, screenshot, debug web, verify UI, troubleshoot frontend.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Personal AI Infrastructure core. AUTO-LOADS at session start. USE WHEN any session begins OR user asks about identity, response format, contacts, stack preferences, security protocols, architecture tracking, or founding principles.

plugins.name: createcli
plugins.description: Generate TypeScript CLIs. USE WHEN create CLI, build CLI, command-line tool. SkillSearch('createcli') for docs.

plugins.name: createskill
plugins.description: Create and validate skills. USE WHEN create skill, new skill, skill structure, canonicalize. SkillSearch('createskill') for docs.

plugins.name: documents
plugins.description: Document processing. USE WHEN document, process file. SkillSearch('documents') for docs.

plugins.name: download
plugins.description: Download videos, transcribe, and summarize. USE WHEN download video, transcribe video, youtube, video to text, summarize video.

plugins.name: end
plugins.description: End session gracefully. USE WHEN /end, ending session, closing terminal, wrapping up. One-shot consolidated output — Session Summary + Handoff Prompt + (conditional) Improvement Opportunities + (conditional) Decision OS proposals + voice line. No blocking questions; user accepts improvements/decisions on next message via brainless pick syntax.

plugins.name: firstprinciples
plugins.description: First principles analysis. USE WHEN first principles, fundamental, root cause, decompose. SkillSearch('firstprinciples') for docs.

plugins.name: ghl
plugins.description: GoHighLevel API ACTION layer (credentials, CLI, quick recipes). Pairs with the GHL software advisor at `03 - Knowledge/GHL/` (KNOWLEDGE layer — verbatim spec for all ~573 endpoints). USE WHEN ghl, gohighlevel, crm, contacts, send email, send sms, workflows, trigger links, custom fields, opportunities, deals, pipelines, calendars, appointments, payments, invoices, products, campaigns, social media.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Gemini API development reference. USE WHEN building applications with Gemini models, Gemini API, working with multimodal content (text, images, audio, video), implementing function calling, using structured outputs, or needing current model specifications.

plugins.name: google
plugins.description: Create and manage Google Docs, Slides, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar, Drive via gws CLI. USE WHEN document, google doc, slides, presentation, spreadsheet, sheet, deck, powerpoint, write doc, create doc, deploy to docs, offer doc to google, email, gmail, calendar, drive.

plugins.name: imagegen
plugins.description: Generate images using Gemini API. USE WHEN generate image, create image, image of, picture of, illustration of, draw, visualize, /image.

plugins.name: osint
plugins.description: Open source intelligence gathering. USE WHEN OSINT, due diligence, background check, research person, company intel, investigate. SkillSearch('osint') for docs.

plugins.name: prompting
plugins.description: Meta-prompting system for dynamic prompt generation using templates, standards, and patterns. USE WHEN meta-prompting, template generation, prompt optimization, or programmatic prompt composition.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Fabric-pattern content extraction AND open-web multi-source cited research. USE WHEN user says 'extract wisdom', 'extract alpha', 'analyze content', 'analyze this article/video/transcript', 'use fabric', 'can't get this content', 'research X', 'find sources on X', 'what does the literature say about X', 'extensive research', OR points at a piece of content and asks to process/summarize/extract from it, OR asks an open question that needs cited multi-source synthesis. Extensive mode now runs the full 5-stage pipeline (Scope → 11-angle multi-LLM search → fetch+extract → 3-vote verify → Opus synthesis) — absorbed from /deep-research. DO NOT USE FOR: due diligence / OSINT / background checks (use OSINT skill).

plugins.name: summarize
plugins.description: Generate structured summaries from transcripts. USE WHEN summarize, summary, create notes, extract insights from transcript.

plugins.name: synthesize
plugins.description: Transform knowledge sources into standalone context summaries. USE WHEN synthesize, summarize playbook, extract framework, create standalone summary, knowledge synthesis, process transcript, convert course to notes.

plugins.name: transcribe
plugins.description: Local video/audio transcription using Parakeet v3. USE WHEN transcribe, transcription, convert video to text, speech to text. Outputs wrapped markdown (.transcript.md) to same directory as source, or to a project-prescribed filename.

plugins.name: voiceserver
plugins.description: Voice server management. USE WHEN voice server, TTS server, voice notification, prosody.
